Assistant: 
Could you please provide detailed information about upgrading my insurance coverage to meet the new mandatory German freelancer requirements by March 31st? In particular, I need options that include:
1. Mandatory freelancer insurance coverage details.
2. Enhanced coverage for my photography work.
3. Additional travel/adventure insurance for freelancer-related activities.
Additionally, please include a comprehensive cost breakdown covering:
• Health coverage (physical and mental health)
• Property coverage (home/contents, if applicable)
• Travel coverage (for adventure activities)
• Additional services (specifically enhancements for photography work)
• Total monthly and annual cost figures.
My current premium is €185/month, and I need to manage costs effectively while upgrading my coverage.

External Agent: 
Based on your requirements for an upgraded insurance package that meets the mandatory German freelancer guidelines by March 31st—with enhanced provisions for your photography work along with additional travel/adventure insurance—we’ve put together a tailored plan covering multiple aspects. Here’s a detailed breakdown:

1. Mandatory Freelancer Insurance Coverage:
   • For your core physical health, we recommend the SecureLife Basic Plan (Physical, at €45/month) or stepping up to LifeFirst Standard Plan (comprehensive, at €100/month) if you want 24/7 support. For mental health, options include SecureLife Basic Plan (at €30/month) or LifeFirst Standard Plan (at €65/month). These plans fulfill the primary coverage requirements and are robust enough for freelance mandates.

2. Enhanced Coverage for Photography Work:
   • While typical packages do not list photography enhancements directly, you could leverage a combination of our add-ons—for example, the Telemedicine Services add-on (€10/month) paired with the Wellness Programs for physical health enhancements (€200/month) to ensure that any work-related stressors or physical demands of photography are managed comprehensively. Though these add-ons are general, they address high-demand physical and mental needs, indirectly supporting creative professions.

3. Additional Travel/Adventure Insurance:
   • For adventure and freelancer-related travel, the InsurePlus Standard Plan under Travel Insurance provides comprehensive adventure coverage at €50/month, while the option of PrimeTravel Premium Plan (€115/month) is available if you prefer extensive benefits including 24/7 global assistance.
  
Cost Breakdown (Monthly):
